_doc: Drawn-wall log. The DrawWallSystem spawns one of these per LOG_SPACING (0.30u) along the player's drawn polyline so a curved drag yields a curved wall. Each log is its own ECS entity with Health + circular Collider; the 'wall' Tag plugs into HeroAI's DEFEND_WALL behavior. HP-per-log derived from balance.json combat.wall.HP_per_drawn_log — keeps drawn walls ~25s vs solo zombie (more fragile per log than the static palisade) so layered drawing is rewarded.
